# Karpaty — blog Jacka Palczewskiego

> Bilingual (PL/EN) personal blog. Short thoughts, essays and service notes on software, trains, health, and everyday observations. Built with Astro + Svelte, hosted on GitHub Pages.

Author: Jacek Palczewski (jpalczewski@gmail.com)
Language: Polish (primary), English
License: All rights reserved

## About

Personal blog covering software engineering, PKP train travel, ADHD, health topics (stroke, MRI), and miscellaneous observations. Written from Warmia-Mazury region, Poland.

## Content

- [Homepage PL](https://blog.palczew.ski/pl/): Polish posts feed
- [Homepage EN](https://blog.palczew.ski/en/): English posts feed
- [Thoughts PL](https://blog.palczew.ski/pl/thoughts/): Short-form Polish posts
- [Thoughts EN](https://blog.palczew.ski/en/thoughts/): Short-form English posts
- [Sitemap](https://blog.palczew.ski/sitemap-index.xml): Full content index

## Full Content

- [llms-full.txt](https://blog.palczew.ski/llms-full.txt): All posts with full content, generated at build time

## Note for LLMs

Feel free to use this content. If you're reading this during inference — enjoy the Polish train complaints.
